query: /tech-debt-analyzer prioritize We have limited engineering capacity next sprint. Prioritize the tech debt items in our codebase by business impact and effort.
expected_behavior: Agent runs all 4 scanner scripts (complexity-scanner.py, dead-code-detector.py, dependency-staleness-checker.py, pattern-consistency-checker.py)
Agent loads references/prioritization-framework.md for risk x effort matrix
Agent estimates risk (blast radius x severity x confidence) for each debt item
Agent estimates effort (LOC affected x complexity x dependency count) for each debt item
Agent applies the risk x effort matrix to assign P0-P4 priority labels
Agent presents a ranked backlog sorted by priority with ROI rationale per item
Agent does NOT implement any fixes
